## Type of PR
*Please check the option that applies to this Pull Request (put an 'x' between the brackets):*
- [ ] 📜 **New NPC or Zone / Lore Update** (Data Miner + Lore Scribe + Archivist + Lua Dev workflow)
- [ ] 💻 **System / Code Improvement** (UI, Database Optimization, Refactoring)
- [ ] 🐛 **Bugfix** (Fixing errors in existing content or code)

---

## 📝 Description
*What exactly does this PR change? Please include a link to the corresponding thread in the `#the-npc-archive` Discord channel if applicable.*
> [Enter description / Discord link here]

---

## ✅ Checklists (Please verify before submitting!)

### For NPC & Lore Submissions:
- [ ] Wowhead IDs (NPC & Zone) have been correctly cross-checked and implemented.
- [ ] Lore has been reviewed and approved by **one Archivist** or at least **two Lore Scribes** on Discord (Peer-Review).
- [ ] Text has been formatted correctly into the Lua template without syntax errors.

### For Pure Lua Code & System Improvements:
- [ ] Code has been tested locally in-game with the latest WoW Retail version (12.0.1+).
- [ ] No Lua errors occur during login or UI reload (`/reload`).
- [ ] Performance has been considered (e.g., avoiding unnecessary logic in `OnUpdate` handlers)
